title: Twelve districts
body: Secundus spreads beyond the academy walls: twelve districts, each with its own guilds, markets, and quiet corners where rumor outruns truth.

title: Red rank
body: Rutilus is the first rung of the Veneficturis ladder — the red sash, the smallest voice in council, and the longest road upward.

title: Mentor's notes
body: Myramar's marginalia are neat as scripture. Telvar has learned to read them twice: once for the lesson, once for what is not said.

title: The Test of Fire
body: Older students speak of the Test of Fire in half-sentences, as if naming it fully might call its heat into the room.

title: Sigils behind cordon
body: The Restricted Section shelves are warded with layered sigils. Even the rope is part of the working — a polite boundary with teeth.

title: Founders' oath
body: The founders swore Veneficturis would teach restraint before power. The oath is carved above the main hall; the library remembers the exceptions.
